SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-09-2024 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-09-2024 BY JUDGE PRO TEM. PLAINTIFF EVE DEL CASTELLP IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JOHAN VAN ROOYEN IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: MARGARET WU; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
